---
title: "Ontology Explorer"
subtitle: "RDF Turtle Representation"
---

The SEC Corporate Subsidiary Knowledge Graph represents corporate entities and relationship assertions as RDF triples. Below is the full serialized knowledge graph in Turtle (`.ttl`) format, governed by OWL axioms.

## RDF Turtle Serialization

You can inspect the assertions, inverse properties, and class definitions below:

```turtle
{{< include data_graph.ttl >}}
```
